alert.rule_description: EHRAPP: possible brute force (5 failed logins in 5 minutes)

summary_observed: Multiple failed login attempts occurred within the correlation window.
Activity is consistent with brute-force or credential guessing against the EHR service.
analyst_questions: Is this username expected to be used on a shared workstation?
Were there any successful logins for the same username around this time?
Did other clinic endpoints show similar authentication failures (spray behavior)?
recommended_next_steps: Check for recent successful logins for the same username and source IP.
Review nginx/web logs for request rate, user-agent patterns, and other endpoints accessed.
If confirmed malicious: reset/disable the account temporarily and block the source IP at the firewall.
Check whether any privileged accounts were targeted and whether MFA/conditional access is in place.
